repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: Support Proposition 1 null-annihilator criterion for proximal ATE point identification

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023: proximal counterfactual means can remain identified without unique bridge functions
BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023 plus AndrewsCheng2012: strongly identified functionals and general weak/semi-strong/strong identification theory overlap the proposed phase-diagram shape
SmuclerRobinsRotnitzky2025 plus AndrewsCheng2012: uniformly valid confidence sets under weak identification and integral-equation functionals overlap the projection-CS kernel

novelty_flags.label: Conjectures 1-2
novelty_flags.one_line: The draft misses AndrewsCheng2012 Econometrica, a closer general weak/semi-strong/strong identification comparator for extremum/GMM confidence sets; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship until the proposal states a strict proximal-only extension not covered by that framework.

novelty_flags.label: Abstract / Conjectures 1-2
novelty_flags.one_line: The abstract promises an analogue/tightening relative to BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023 and SmuclerRobinsRotnitzky2025, but the Conjecture 1-2 headline statements are not phrased as strict tightenings or iff frontiers against those named results.

soundness_flags.label: Conjectures 1-2
soundness_flags.one_line: Omega(P) is defined as the covariance of a sample bridge residual using an unspecified bridge solution beta*, so rho_n(P), q(P), and the projection critical value are not pinned when bridge solutions are nonunique.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define Omega(P) using a named selector, e.g. the minimum-norm bridge, or add an invariance condition showing the covariance entering rho_n is identical across the target-equivalent bridge fiber.
Add AndrewsCheng2012 as a location-anchored comparator and state exactly which proximal negative-control feature is not an instance of their weak-identification expansion.
Rewrite Conjecture 1 as an explicit strict extension of Bennett et al.'s strong-functional condition to local triangular arrays indexed by rho_n, or downgrade the abstract comparator language.
For Conjecture 2, give a one- or two-dimensional worked projection statistic for the Section 9 witness, including the profile Q_n(psi0) and resulting set diameter.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal to pin Omega, add the missed weak-identification comparator, and restate the two conjectures as explicit comparator-facing frontiers before another novelty review.
